Escape Plan
AI-powered seasonal planner

Follow the Sun.
Never Rent Full Price.

The ultra-wealthy have always done this. Move with the seasons — always in perfect weather, always at shoulder-season prices. Our AI builds your rotation plan.

AI Rotation Planner

Pick your top 2–3 priorities and we'll generate a personalized 4-season rotation plan.

Explore by Season

🇹🇭

Chiang Mai

Thailand · 18–28°C

$1,000/mo
Tourist 30+30 days

Cool dry season. Best weather of the year. Digital nomad mecca at peak.

Cool & dryYi Peng lanterns (Nov)Nomad community peakMountain hiking
🇨🇷

Tamarindo

Costa Rica · 28–34°C

$1,800/mo
90-day free

Dry season (Dec–April). Perfect Pacific beach weather. Pura vida peak.

Dry season surfTurtle nestingPacific sunsetsJungle + beach
🇨🇴

Medellín

Colombia · 20–26°C

$1,000/mo
90-day free

Eternal spring, but Dec-Feb is cleanest air season. Expats flood in.

Eternal spring climateExpat Christmas energyBest air qualityFestival season
🇲🇽

Puerto Vallarta

Mexico · 24–30°C

$1,400/mo
180-day tourist

Pacific beach perfect weather. Strong expat community. Easy from US/CA.

Perfect beach weatherWhale watchingExpat communityEasy US flights
